source: updated 2026-06-17: same e5 DD-compliant strategy (e5 / range_uniform / slm2.3 / gap0.0 / max_hold 90 / tp1_lock_delay 20 / tp1_lock_fraction 0.25 / lock_after_tp2 off / shared_sl), now fed the RSI-filtered scalper24 feed (generator --rsi-buy-max 70 --rsi-sell-min 30: skip overbought-buys / oversold-sells). The R4 entry-feature sweep (16 generator-feature variants x strategy/geometry, slippage-aware 2.0/1.0, DD<=40% & OOS>0) found RSI is the ONLY entry-feature that beats the unfiltered 'base' feed on BOTH edge AND OOS at DD<=40%: rsi edge $39,508 / OOS $7,199 / DD 33.4% / compounded $755,782 vs base edge $39,020 / OOS $6,629 / DD 33.3% / compounded $719,125 (apples-to-apples, same sweep). The filter is thin (~0.5% of signals dropped) so the lift is modest (OOS +8.6%, edge +1.3%); strategy params unchanged, low risk. The prior e5 promotion (edge $39,062 / OOS $6,671) superseded SC24T24E8 for R4parab after it breached the 40% DD gate (58.3%); R2bull/R3strong still SC24T24E8.
